Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake part listings, promotions, and product details to use as email content fodder.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, order history, and issue descriptions.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Retrieves Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored as HubSpot form entries or contacts.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, bloggers, and influencers in relevant niches.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls creator profiles, subscriber counts, engagement metrics, and content details from YouTube, Instagram, and Google search results.

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters thousands of potential creators down to a qualified shortlist, eliminating hours of manual vetting and ensuring brand-relevant matches.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt guidelines stored in Google Drive for AI-powered personalization.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real customer demand data at scale without manual outreach, helping validate which gaps are worth filling before committing to production.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive output that combines competitive intelligence with customer demand — giving Dino everything needed to make sourcing decisions in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into live ad copy across platforms in seconds — eliminating the need to manually click through each campaign and ad set.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases, identifies exact matches, and records the precise field and full copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, outdated messaging, or prohibited language instantly — preventing costly ad disapprovals or brand inconsistencies from going unnoticed.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the matched phrase, the specific field it was found in, and the surrounding copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit directly to the team's inbox on demand, enabling immediate review and correction without any manual ad platform navigation.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking 54 total agents — 22 completed, 12 in progress, and 20 planned. Two new agents were added to the pipeline this week: **R1 Video Clipper** and **Paid Channel Chat bot**, both entering the Planned stage. No agents changed stages this week, so the team is heads-down building out the 12 currently in progress. Steady momentum across the board — more updates to come as work continues!
